title: Imitating Life - The Audacity of Suzanne Heintz
original_title: Imitating Life - The Audacity of Suzanne Heintz
overview: Satirical artist and art director, Suzanne Heintz, adopted her fake family more than 15 years ago to challenge persisting stereotypes about women's lives.
